CreateStatelessCfw.name: CFW name, up to 65 characters, must start with a letter or Chinese character, only letters (upper/lower), digits, Chinese characters, and -_/. are allowed
CreateStatelessCfw.defaultAction: Default policy; use "deny" for whitelist mode, "allow" for blacklist mode
CreateStatelessCfw.protocol: Protocol, valid values: [ TCP | UDP | ICMP | ALL ]
CreateStatelessCfw.ipList: IP list; in blacklist mode, matched IPs are denied access; in whitelist mode, matched IPs are allowed access
